name: Baba Ghannouj (Eggplant and Sesame Puree)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the eggplant on the center shelf of a preheated oven and cook until soft, turning occasionally.
2. Once cooked, peel off the skin while it is still hot. Remove the stem and end of the eggplant if firm.
3. Chop the flesh and place it in a blender or food processor. Puree the mixture and blend in most of the lemon juice.
4. Crush the garlic with 1 teaspoon salt to form a paste. Add this to the eggplant mixture and beat well.
5. Adjust the flavor by adding more lemon juice and salt as needed, then beat in olive oil and chopped parsley.
6. If using a food processor, add about 4 sprigs of parsley into the container and process until finely chopped but still visible.
7. Transfer the puree to a shallow dish and garnish with additional parsley. Serve with Arab bread as an appetizer.
